series_metadata.series_title: Closed Scrap Tire Collection, Recovery, Storage and Transporter Facilities
series_metadata.series_description: Withdrawn applications, correspondence, and final actions related to the facility. Original copies of final actions are kept in the journal room in Central Office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain onsite for 1 year after closing of facility. Then retain offsite 7 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
